utterances.speaker: Alice
utterances.text: Okay, let's go through the Q3 budget.

utterances.speaker: Alice
utterances.text: We have 5000 total for the quarter.

utterances.speaker: Bob
utterances.text: So we have 3500 left to allocate.

utterances.speaker: Bob
utterances.text: Hey Rahid, make a diagram of our budget.

utterances.speaker: Alice
utterances.text: Nice. What should we cut to save another 1000?
